mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trips (user_id, title, trip_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{tripDate}, 'IN_PROGRESS', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.title, t.trip_date, t.status, t.created_at, COUNT(v.id) AS visit_count FROM trips t LEFT JOIN visit_logs v ON t.id = v.trip_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.update: UPDATE trips SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_logs (trip_id, heritage_id, photo_url, location, explanation, visited_at) VALUES ( #{tripId}, #{heritageId}, #{photoUrl}, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lat}, ' ', #{lng}, ')'), 4326), #{explanation}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.trip_id, v.heritage_id, h.name AS heritage_name, v.photo_url, ST_Latitude(v.location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(v.location) AS lng, v.explanation, v.visited_at FROM visit_logs v JOIN heritage h ON v.heritage_id = h.id WHERE v.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY v.visited_at
